questions.question: After mnemonic restore, does handleRestore call fetchBackup to check for an existing backup?
If a backup is found, is a confirmation dialog shown before restoring?
Does the dialog warn that restore replaces all local data?
On confirm, does it call restoreFromBackup() and then window.location.reload()?
On dismiss/skip, does it continue with identity-only recovery (setRestoreSuccess)?
If no backup is found or fetchBackup fails, does the flow continue normally?
